settings.heading: House of Clarence
settings.intro: The furnishings and finishes house for homes of substantial value. Where the house is built, House of Clarence furnishes it.
settings.default_image_alt: A quiet sitting room glimpsed through bronze-tinted glass doors
Pale oak grain in soft natural light
settings.heading: A considered standard of care
settings.text: We bring the same rigour to furnishing a home as goes into building it. Every piece is chosen for material honesty, provenance and longevity — vanities, baths, brassware, kitchens, lighting and joinery, made to be lived in.

settings.heading: Quiet confidence
settings.text:
Premium brand, premium clients — without premium pricing. We win by behaving like the most confident, quietest house in the room, and letting the work imply the value. Price is stated plainly, never sold.

Calm, considered, tactile. It is about how a home makes you feel.

settings.heading: Working on a project?
settings.text: We work with interior designers, architects and builders. Speak to us about specification, trade pricing and bulk.
